title: Rosalinda Tijerina
compiled_truth: Rosalinda Tijerina is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Top correspondents: [James Steffes](people/james-steffes) (1), [Harry Kingerski](people/harry-kingerski) (1), [Don Black](people/don-black) (1), [Jbennett](people/jbennett-gmssr) (1), [Tamara Johnson](people/tamara-johnson) (1).
